This release migrates the project's development and build tooling from [Poetry](https://python-poetry.org/) to [uv](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/). Runtime behavior, public API, supported Python versions, and dependencies are unchanged — `pip install tracking-markers` works exactly as before.

### Tooling

- `pyproject.toml` rewritten as a standard PEP 621 project, using uv's native `uv_build` backend.
- `poetry.lock` replaced with `uv.lock`.
- Dev dependencies moved to PEP 735 `[dependency-groups]`.
- `tracking_markers.__version__` is now derived from installed package metadata (`importlib.metadata`), so the version lives in one place only — `pyproject.toml`.

### Development workflow

```bash
uv sync          # set up the environment
uv run pytest    # run the test suite
uv build         # build sdist + wheel
uv publish       # publish to PyPI
```

**Full changelog:** https://github.com/bertoldi-collab/tracking-markers/compare/v0.9.0...v0.10.0

Enjoy! :octocat:
